content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Balanced Rating Changes". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1237/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers a and b.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the result in a new line.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Calculate the difference between a and b, then apply the given conditions to determine the output.
